kw.name: Check image valid
kw.doc:
Check if the captured image can read by opencv or not (valid or not)
argument: - ``image`` : image(jpg) path to check valid
return: - ``result`` : true or false. type is boolean
kw.shortdoc: Check if the captured image can read by opencv or not (valid or not)

kw.name: Compare Images
kw.doc:
Compare two image files
argument: - ``origin`` : image(jpg) path captured (required) - ``expected`` : image(jpg) path expected (required)
return: - ``result`` : True or False. type is boolean - ``matching persentage`` : matching persentage. type is str(float)
Examples: | ${result} | ${percent} | `Compare Images` | ${IMG PATH}\captured.jpg | ${IMG PATH}\expected.jpg |

kw.name: Convert IMG to String
kw.doc:
Optical Character Recognition
Author : quang2.pham
pre condition - 1. Install Tesseract-OCR : https://github.com/UB-Mannheim/tesseract/wiki to C:\Program Files\Tesseract-OCR - 2. If you want other language what excluded english, please refernce https://tesseract-ocr.github.io/tessdoc/Data-Files page.
argument: - ``img_path`` : image(jpg) path - ``languge`` : language to detect, default value is english.
return: - string to result of tesseract
Examples: | ${result_str}= | `Convert IMG to String` | ${IMG PATH}\captured.jpg | | ${result_str}= | `Convert IMG to String` | ${IMG PATH}\captured.jpg | eng |

kw.name: Cut image

arguments.repr: origin, cut_img, x1, y1, x2, y2

kw.doc:
Cut image
argument: - ``origin`` : image(jpg) path - ``cut_img`` : cuted image(jpg) path - ``x1`` : left-up X coordinate - ``y1`` : left-up Y coordinate - ``x2`` : righit-bottom X coordinate - ``y2`` : righit-bottom Y coordinate
return: - ``cut_img`` : cuted image file path
Examples: | ${cut_img} | `Cut image` | ${IMG PATH}\captured.jpg | ${IMG PATH}\cut_img.jpg | 600 | 300 | 700 | 500 |

kw.name: Find image on screen
kw.doc:
Captures the specified screen, checks if there is the reference image inside the captured image. If the reference image has been found, the function returns its coordinates.
argument: - ``origin`` : image(jpg) path to compare (required) - ``expected`` : image(jpg) path you want to find (required) - ``threshold`` : threshold of matching persentage (type is int 0 ~ 100 )
return: - ``result`` : pass or fail. type is string - ``x coordinates`` : If pass, return the x-coordinate of the center point. type is str(int) else, return str(-1) - ``y coordinates`` : If pass, return the y-coordinate of the center point. type is str(int) else, return str(-1) - ``matching persentage`` : matching persentage. type is str(float)
Examples: | ${result} | ${X} | ${Y} | ${percent} | `Find image on screen` | ${IMG PATH}\captured.jpg | ${IMG PATH}\expected.jpg | | ${result} | ${X} | ${Y} | ${percent} | `Find image on screen` | ${IMG PATH}\captured.jpg | ${IMG PATH}\expected.jpg | threshold=90 |
kw.shortdoc: Captures the specified screen, checks if there is the reference image inside the captured image. If the reference image has been found, the function returns its coordinates.

arguments.repr: img_path, string, output_suffix=, language=eng, rect_size=15, full_screen_check=True
